rulings.Case Title: SALVADORE PENA et al VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIAL COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, December 29, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Alta Building Material Co.¿s motion to compel responses to special interrogatories and requests for production and request for sanctions is off calendar at the moving party's request. = (220/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: SHANE BRANDON et al VS. CERTAINTEED CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Production Of Pathology Materials
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, December 29, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel non-party Bakersfield Memorial Hospital to produce pathology materials pertaining to decedent James Brandon, Sr. is granted. The materials are reasonably likely to lead to the discovery of admissible evidence. The pathology materials shall be produced to plaintiffs¿ counsel by January 28, 2011. If a hearing is requested, it will be conducted at 9:00am in Department 220, Hon. Ernest H. Goldsmith presiding. = (220/EHG)
